hero.headline: It's 11pm. You just had a fight.
hero.subheadline: AI relationship assistant, available 24/7. Based on 40 years of Gottman science.
hero.trialNote: No credit card required · Cancel anytime

modes.title: Three modes. One assistant.
modes.subtitle: Zerova detects what you need — or you can choose.

safeSpace.title: Safe Space
safeSpace.desc: Process difficult emotions and conflicts in a space designed to make you feel genuinely heard before offering any guidance.

coach.title: Coach
coach.desc: Learn and practice specific Gottman skills — Gentle Start-Up, accepting responsibility, turning toward — using your real situations.

checkin.title: Daily Check-in
checkin.desc: A two-minute pulse on your relationship. Builds a longitudinal picture of your dynamic over time.

science.title: Not opinions. Science.
science.subtitle: Every intervention is grounded in peer-reviewed relationship research.
science.stat1: of couples report stronger relationships after consistent Gottman practice
science.stat2: years of peer-reviewed research behind the methodology
science.stat3: scientific frameworks: Gottman Method, EFT, CBCT
science.quote: Couples who learn and apply Gottman principles report measurable improvements in relationship satisfaction, communication, and conflict resolution.
science.quoteSource: — The Gottman Institute, based on 40 years of research

urgency.title: The cost of waiting
urgency.stat1: years the average couple waits before seeking help
urgency.stat2: have already decided to divorce by the time they seek help
urgency.stat3: Zerova is available when your therapist isn't
urgency.message: Every month of unresolved conflict makes the patterns harder to change. Don't wait until it's too late.

cta.title: Your relationship deserves this.
cta.subtitle: Most couples wait until things are critical. The best time to build relational intelligence is before you need it urgently.

signup.subtitle: Create your account
signup.name: First name
signup.trial: 7-day free trial included · No credit card required
signup.emailConfirmDesc: We sent a confirmation link to
signup.emailConfirmNote: Click the link in the email to activate your account.

step1.title: How will you use Zerova?
step1.desc: This shapes how the assistant responds to you.
step1.soloDesc: I want to work on myself and my relationship skills
step1.coupleDesc: My partner and I will use it together

step2.title: How long have you been together?

step3.title: How would you describe things right now?
step3.stableDesc: Things are mostly good — I want to keep growing
step3.tensionDesc: We have recurring friction but we're managing
step3.crisisDesc: Things are difficult and we need real help

step4.title: What's the main area you want to work on?
step4.desc: Choose the one that feels most relevant right now.

dashboard.trialExpiredDesc: Subscribe to continue your relational journey.
dashboard.subtitle: How are things between you two today?
dashboard.talkDesc: Just start talking — Zerova detects what you need

subscribe.title: Continue your journey
subscribe.subtitle: Your trial has ended. Subscribe to keep building.
features: Full Coach mode with skill tracking
subscribe.secure: Secure payment via Paddle · Cancel anytime

chat.emptyState: Just start talking — Zerova is listening
chat.inputHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
